accountCode.description: The code of a new account created for the account holder.

accountHolderCode.description: The code of the new account holder.

accountHolderDetails.description: Details of the new account holder.

accountHolderStatus.description: The status of the new account holder.

description.description: The description of the new account holder.

invalidFields.description: A list of fields that caused the `/createAccountHolder` request to fail.

legalEntity.description: The type of legal entity of the new account holder.

primaryCurrency.description: The three-character [ISO currency code](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/currency-codes), with which the prospective account holder primarily deals.

pspReference.description: The reference of a request. Can be used to uniquely identify the request.

verification.description: The details of KYC Verification of the account holder.

verificationProfile.description: The identifier of the profile that applies to this entity.
